requires.text: ghost var b: int := total / 2 - a; IsValidCME(a, b, a + b)
ghost var b: int := total / 2 - a; IsValidCME(a, b, a + b)
ghost var b: int := total / 2 - a; IsValidCME(a, b, a + b)
ghost var b: int := total / 2 - a; IsValidCME(a, b, a + b)
ghost var b: int := total / 2 - a; a + b + a + b == total

assertions.text: a + b + a + b == total / 2 + total / 2

foralls.ensures: !ghost var b: int := total / 2 - a; IsValidCME(a, b, a + b) && a + b + a + b == total

ensures.text: forall e: int | 0 <= e < extra :: !CanFormCMEWithMatches(n + e)
forall e: int | 0 <= e < extra :: !CanFormCMEWithMatches(n + e)

requires.text: forall t: int {:trigger t % 2} | n <= t < n + extra :: t < 4 || t % 2 == 1
forall t: int {:trigger t % 2} | n <= t < n + extra :: t < 4 || t % 2 == 1

ensures.text: forall e: int | 0 <= e < extra :: !CanFormCMEWithMatches(n + e)
forall e: int | 0 <= e < extra :: !CanFormCMEWithMatches(n + e)
